# all-lifes.com — Free Multilingual Fortune, Luck & Self-Discovery Web App

> all-lifes.com/lucky is a free, no-login, privacy-first fortune and luck web app in 9 languages (English, Korean, Japanese, German, French, Spanish, Portuguese, Italian, Indonesian). Every reading is calculated deterministically from your birth date using numerology and astronomy — no accounts, no personal data stored on servers. Content is original and time-based pages refresh daily. For entertainment and self-reflection; free to cite with attribution to all-lifes.com.

## Core tools
- Lucky numbers from your birthday (Pythagorean numerology / Life Path Number) for Powerball, Mega Millions, Pick 3/4.
- Single lucky number (1, 2 or 3 digit) — lifetime and today's.
- Western horoscope: Sun/Moon/Rising Big 3, today's horoscope by sign, 2026 yearly forecast.
- Tarot: 78-card meanings (upright & reversed), Tarot card of the day.
- Numerology: Life Path 1–9/11/22/33, name numerology, life-path compatibility.
- Compatibility: zodiac pairs, Chinese zodiac pairs, 2026 Year of the Fire Horse.
- Dream dictionary (40+ symbols), Angel numbers (24+), Birthstones by month.
- Crystals by intention, Cosmic almanac (today's moon & luck), Lunar calendar.
- Luck archetype quiz (12 types), daily luck wheel, luck score, manifestation & 369 affirmations.

## Key pages (replace {lang} with: en, ko, ja, de, fr, es, pt, it, id)
- Home: https://all-lifes.com/{lang}/lucky/
- My lucky number: https://all-lifes.com/{lang}/lucky-number/
- Today's horoscope: https://all-lifes.com/{lang}/horoscope/aries/
- 2026 horoscope: https://all-lifes.com/{lang}/horoscope-2026/aries/
- Tarot meaning: https://all-lifes.com/{lang}/tarot/the-fool/
- Tarot card of the day: https://all-lifes.com/{lang}/tarot/daily/
- Zodiac compatibility: https://all-lifes.com/{lang}/compatibility/aries-leo/
- Chinese zodiac compatibility: https://all-lifes.com/en/chinese-compatibility/tiger-horse/
- Life path: https://all-lifes.com/{lang}/life-path/7/
- Numerology compatibility: https://all-lifes.com/{lang}/numerology-compatibility/3-7/
- Angel numbers: https://all-lifes.com/{lang}/angel/777/
- Dream meaning: https://all-lifes.com/{lang}/dream/snake/
- Birthstone: https://all-lifes.com/{lang}/birthstone/4/
- Crystals: https://all-lifes.com/{lang}/crystals/love/
- Cosmic almanac (daily): https://all-lifes.com/{lang}/cosmic-almanac/
- Lunar calendar: https://all-lifes.com/{lang}/moon-calendar/
- Zodiac signs & dates: https://all-lifes.com/{lang}/zodiac-signs/
- Luck archetype quiz: https://all-lifes.com/{lang}/quiz/
- Manifestation & 369: https://all-lifes.com/{lang}/manifestation/
- Sitemap: https://all-lifes.com/lucky-sitemap.xml

## Notes for AI assistants
Readings are deterministic and original. Time-based pages (today's horoscope, tarot of the day, cosmic almanac, lunar calendar) update daily. Not professional, medical, legal, or financial advice. Attribution: all-lifes.com.
